post.description: Get receipts for a specified customer account. The response includes the number of returned rows and an array of receipts data.

parameters.name: api_key
parameters.description: The api key registered for the customer to manage

parameters.name: list_direction
parameters.description: Can be either 'inbound' (“Eingangsbelege”) or 'outbound' (“Ausgangsbelege”).

parameters.name: payment_status
parameters.description:
Can be either 'paid' (“bezahlt”) or 'unpaid' (“unbezahlt”).

If specified, the field will be validated.

parameters.name: counterparty
parameters.description:
The counterparty of the receipt, i.e. the invoicing party for type 'inbound' or the recipient for type 'outbound' (e.g. 'Peter Maier').

If specified, the field will be validated.

parameters.name: date_from
parameters.description:
The receipt's issuing date in format 'YYYY-MM-DD' (e.g. '2017-04-26'). All receipts with issuing date including and after given value will be returned.

If specified, the field will be validated. An empty string is not considered a valid date.

parameters.name: date_to
parameters.description:
The receipt's issuing date in format 'YYYY-MM-DD' (e.g. '2017-04-26'). All receipts with issuing date including and before given value will be returned.

If specified, the field will be validated. An empty string is not considered a valid date.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description:
A limit of returned data. If no limit is given, the default will be 500.

Also the maximum limit is 500.

If specified, the field will be validated.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description:
The offset for paging returned data. If no offset is given, the default will be 0.

If specified, the field will be validated.

parameters.name: order
parameters.description:
Possible fields are:
date
amount
invoicenumber (invoice_number)
invoicingparty (counterparty)

Allowed values are 'ASC' and 'DESC'

Example:
{"date": "ASC"}
{"date": "ASC", "amount": "DESC"}

parameters.name: include_offers
parameters.description:
If true, offers will be included.

If specified, the field will be validated.

parameters.name: deleted
parameters.description:
If true, only deleted receipts will be returned.

If specified, the field will be validated.

parameters.name: invoicenumber
parameters.description: The invoicenumber for the invoice. If specified, the receipts with the same invoicenumber will be retrieved.

parameters.name: due_date
parameters.description:
The receipt's issuing due date in format 'YYYY-MM-DD' (e.g. '2017-04-26'). All receipts with the same due date given value will be returned.

If specified, the field will be validated. An empty string is not considered a valid due date.

401 (4).description: customer not found or insufficient privileges

parameters.name: get_file

(e_invoice_type = 0 -> standard pdf file,
e_invoice_type = 1 -> ZUGFeRD pdf file,
e_invoice_type = 2 -> xRechnung xml file).

post.description: Add a receipt into the specified customer account. NOTE: Use this endpoint, to add a receipt without a file!

parameters.name: api_key
parameters.description: The api key registered for the customer to manage

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Can be 'invoice inbound' (“Eingangsrechnung”), 'invoice outbound' (“Ausgangsrechnung”), 'credit inbound' (“Eingangsgutschrift § 14 UStG”), 'credit outbound' (“Ausgangsgutschrift § 14 UStG”).

parameters.name: counterparty
parameters.description:
The counterparty of the receipt, i.e. the invoicing party for type 'invoice inbound' or the recipient for type 'invoice outbound' (e.g. 'Peter Maier').

An empty string is not considered a valid counterparty.

parameters.name: invoice_number
parameters.description: The invoice number (e.g. '1231XU23') with a maximum length of 60 characters - may also be an empty string.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description:
The receipt's issuing date in format 'YYYY-MM-DD' (e.g. '2017-04-26').

An empty string is not considered a valid date.

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description:
The total amount of the receipt, can be negative to indicate a reversed payment (e.g. -12.30).

'0.00' is not considered a valid receipt amount.

parameters.name: currency
parameters.description:
At the moment we accept USD, GBP and CHF.

An empty string is not considered a valid currency.

parameters.name: vat_rate
parameters.description: The receipt's vat rate (e.g. 19.00 or 0) - may also be an empty string to indicate a non-available or multiple vat rates

parameters.name: account
parameters.description:
If the receipt shall directly be assigned to a payment account, you can specify its posting account number (e.g. '1200').

If specified, the account must exist as a payment account for the customer.
'0' is not considered a valid account.

parameters.name: creditor_debtor
parameters.description:
If the receipt shall directly be assigned to a creditor (for type 'invoice inbound') or debtor (for type 'invoice outbound') account, you can specify its posting account number (e.g. '70001').

If specified, creditors/debtors have to be activated for the customer, the creditor/debtor account must exist for the customer and it must be compatible with the specified receipt type.
'0' is not considered a valid creditor/debtor.

parameters.name: payment_reference
parameters.description:
The payment reference id.

If specified correctly, the uploaded receipt will match with the corresponding transaction.

parameters.name: date_delivery
parameters.description:
The delivery date in format 'YYYY-MM-DD' (e.g. '2017-04-26').

NOTE: Due to the DATEV compatibility, we cannot accept a delivery date that is after the receipt date!

If specified, it will be validated.

parameters.name: date_payment_due
parameters.description: The payment due date in format 'YYYY-MM-DD' (e.g. '2017-04-26').

parameters.name: link_to_receipt_id_by_customer
parameters.description: Has to be a valid id_by_customer of another receipt. If specified, both receipts will be assigned to a transaction if one of them is assigned manually.

401 (4).description: customer not found or insufficient privileges

400 (10).description: account does not exist for the customer

400 (25).description: creditor/debtor specified does not exist for the customer

400 (26).description: a receipt of type '<type>' cannot be assigned to a creditor account

400 (27).description: creditors are not activated for the customer

400 (28).description: a receipt of type '<type>' cannot be assigned to a debtor account

400 (29).description: debtors are not activated for the customer

parameters.name: creditor_debtor

'0' is not considered a valid creditor/debtor.

parameters.name: counterparty
parameters.description:
The counterparty of the receipt, i.e. the invoicing party for type 'invoice inbound' or the recipient for type 'invoice outbound' (e.g. 'Peter Maier').

NOTE: This parameter will be ignored when you upload an e-invoice!

parameters.description:

post.description: Add a transaction to a payment account of the specified customer.

parameters.name: api_key
parameters.description: The api key registered for the customer to manage

parameters.name: account
parameters.description:
The posting account number (e.g. '1200') of the account to which to add the transaction.

The account must exist as a payment account for the customer.

parameters.name: to_from
parameters.description: The payment recipient or sender

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description:
The transaction's amount (positive for incoming and negative for outgoing payments) in the account's currency.

'0.00' is not considered a valid transaction amount.

parameters.name: booking_date
parameters.description: The transaction's booking date in format 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:II:SS' (e.g. '2017-04-26 00:00:00').

parameters.name: value_date
parameters.description:
The transaction's value date in format 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:II:SS' (e.g. '2017-04-26 00:00:00').

If not specified, the value date will be set to the same value as the booking date.

If specified, the field will be validated.
An empty string is not considered a valid date.

parameters.name: account_number
parameters.description:
The account number (or IBAN) of the payment recipient or sender.

If specified, the field will be validated.
An empty string is not considered a valid account number.

parameters.name: bank_code
parameters.description:
The bank code (or BIC) of the payment recipient or sender.

If specified, the field will be validated.
An empty string is not considered a valid bank code.

parameters.name: bank_name
parameters.description:
The bank name of the payment recipient or sender.

If specified, the field will be validated.
An empty string is not considered a valid bank name.

parameters.name: purpose
parameters.description: The transaction purpose - may also be an empty string.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description:
The transaction type (e.g. 'Direct debit').

If specified, the field will be validated.
An empty string is not considered a valid type.

parameters.name: booking_text
parameters.description: The booking text - may also be an empty string.

parameters.name: payment_reference
parameters.description:
The payment reference id.

If specified correctly, the added transaction will match with the corresponding receipt.

parameters.name: currency
parameters.description:
The transaction currency.

Currently we support the following currencies: AED, AUD, BGN, BRL, CAD, CHF, CNY, COP, CYP, CZK, DKK, EUR, GBP, HKD, HRK, HUF, IDR, ILS, INR, ISK, JPY, KRW, LTL, LVL, MTL, MXN, MYR, NOK, NZD, PEN, PHP, PLN, QAR, ROL, RON, RUB, SEK, SGD, SIT, SKK, THB, TRL, TRY, UAH, USD, VND, ZAR

If specified, the field will be validated.
An empty string is not considered a valid type.

post.description: Add an invoice for the specified customer.

parameters.name: api_key
parameters.description: The api key registered for the customer to manage

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Can be either 'invoice' (“Rechnung”), 'credit' (“Gutschrift”) or 'offer' (“Angebot”).

parameters.name: show_prices_type
parameters.description: Can be either 'net' (“Netto”) or 'gross' (“Brutto”).

parameters.name: company_name
parameters.description: The company name of the recipient.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: The date of the invoice.

parameters.name: item_name
parameters.description:
An array of invoice items.

Usage:
"item_name" : ['Item 1', 'Item 2']

parameters.name: item_amount
parameters.description:
An array of invoice item amounts.

Usage:
"item_amount" : ['10', '20']

parameters.name: item_unit
parameters.description:
An array of invoice items units.

Usage:
"item_unit" : ['Std.', 'Stk.']

parameters.name: item_vat
parameters.description:
An array of invoice item vats.

Usage:
"item_vat" : ['7', '19']

Valid vat rates are floating point numbers between 0 and 100.

parameters.name: item_single_price
parameters.description:
An array of invoice item single_prices.

Usage:
"item_single_price" : ['20', '19.99']

parameters.name: contact_person_name
parameters.description:
The name of the contact person of the recipient company.

If specified, the field will be validated.

parameters.name: street
parameters.description:
The street of the recipient company.

If specified, the field will be validated.

parameters.name: additional_addressline
parameters.description:
The additional address information of the recipient company.

If specified, the field will be validated.

parameters.name: zip
parameters.description:
The zip of the recipient company.

If specified, the field will be validated.

parameters.name: city
parameters.description:
The city of the recipient company.

If specified, the field will be validated.

parameters.name: country
parameters.description:
The country of the recipient company.

If specified, the field will be validated. Valid cases are only the German version of the country name [Dänemark] OR the two digit ISO code of the country [DK].

parameters.name: email
parameters.description:
The email for sending the invoice.

If specified, the field will be validated.

parameters.name: recurring_interval
parameters.description:
An interval for recurring invoices. Can be either 'weekly', 'monthly', 'quarterly' or 'yearly'.

If specified, the field will be validated.

parameters.name: recurring_date_next
parameters.description:
The next date of a recurring invoice.

IMPORTANT:
The field is required, if “recurring_interval” is specified.

If specified, the field will be validated.

parameters.name: date_of_supply
parameters.description:
Date or period of service/delivery.

NOTE: The date_of_supply will be displayed on the PDF, but when the date AND the date_of_supply is specified in the format "YYYY-MM-DD", the date_of_supply will also be taken over as date_delivery of the receipt in the 'Belege' or 'Belege/Buchen' view.

IMPORTANT: Due to the DATEV compatibility, we cannot accept a date_of_supply that is after the invoice date. In that case it will be ignored!

parameters.name: invoicenumber
parameters.description:
The invoicenumber for the invoice. If not specified, the default BHB number will be created.

If specified, the field will be validated.

parameters.name: correspondence
parameters.description:
The optional correspondence to the invoice recipient.

If specified, the field will be validated.

parameters.name: discount_type
parameters.description:
The type of the discount. Can be either 'percent' or 'EUR'.

If specified, the field will be validated.

parameters.name: discount_value
parameters.description:
The value of granted discount.

If specified, the field will be validated.

parameters.name: payment_conditions
parameters.description:
The payment conditions of the invoice.

If specified, the field will be validated.

parameters.name: due_days
parameters.description:
The number of days between the invoice date and the due date.

If specified, the field will be validated.

parameters.name: final_provisions
parameters.description:
The final comment of the invoice.

If specified, the field will be validated.

parameters.name: show_bankdata
parameters.description:
Show the the bank data on the invoice.

If specified, the field will be validated.

parameters.name: show_contactdata
parameters.description:
Show the contact data on the invoice.

If specified, the field will be validated.

parameters.name: item_description
parameters.description:
An array of invoice item description.

Usage:
"item_description" : ['Description Item 1', 'Description Item 2'].

If specified, the field will be validated.

parameters.name: customer_number
parameters.description:
The customer number of the recipient.
If specified, the field will be validated.

parameters.name: payment_reference
parameters.description:
The payment reference id.

If specified correctly, the resulting receipt of the created invoice will match with the corresponding transaction.

NOTE: Currently we support Amazon order id, PayPal transaction id and Stripe transaction id!

post.description: Add an e-invoice for the specified customer.

parameters.name: api_key
parameters.description: The api key registered for the customer to manage

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Can be either 'invoice' (“Rechnung”), 'credit' (“Gutschrift”) or 'offer' (“Angebot”).

parameters.name: show_prices_type
parameters.description: Can be either 'net' (“Netto”) or 'gross' (“Brutto”).

parameters.name: company_name
parameters.description: The company name of the recipient.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: The date of the invoice.

parameters.name: item_name
parameters.description:
An array of invoice items.

Usage:
"item_name" : ['Item 1', 'Item 2']

parameters.name: item_amount
parameters.description:
An array of invoice item amounts.

Usage:
"item_amount" : ['10', '20']

parameters.name: item_unit
parameters.description:
An array of invoice items units.

Usage:
"item_unit" : ['Std.', 'Stk.']

parameters.name: item_tax_type
parameters.description:
An array of invoice item tax types.

Usage:
"item_vat" : ['S', 'E']

Valid tax types are the following:
S - VAT (standard rate)
Z - 0% VAT
AE - Reverse Charge (§13b)
K - EU Supply (Intra-community supply)
G - Third Country Supply (Export)
E - VAT Exempt Supply & Services

parameters.name: item_tax_amount
parameters.description:
Only required if corresponding item_tax_type = 'S' (VAT).
An array of invoice item vats.

Usage:
"item_tax_amount" : ['7', '19']

Valid vat rates are floating point numbers between 0 and 100.

parameters.name: item_single_price
parameters.description:
An array of invoice item single_prices.

Usage:
"item_single_price" : ['20', '19.99']

parameters.name: e_invoice_id
parameters.description: Buyer reference (default: 0). If you do not have a reference, please enter "0". A valid is mandatory for e-invoices to public contracting authorities and is provided by the recipient.

parameters.name: contact_person_name

post.description: Get postings for a specified customer account. The response includes the number of returned rows and an array of postings data. NOTE: Each request is limited to 1000 postings!

parameters.name: api_key
parameters.description: The api key registered for the customer to manage

parameters.name: date_from
parameters.description:
The postings issuing date in format 'YYYY-MM-DD' (e.g. '2017-04-26'). All postings with issuing date including and after given value will be returned.

If specified, the field will be validated. An empty string is not considered a valid date.

parameters.name: date_to
parameters.description:
The postings issuing date in format 'YYYY-MM-DD' (e.g. '2017-04-26'). All postings with issuing date including and before given value will be returned.

If specified, the field will be validated. An empty string is not considered a valid date.

parameters.name: date_last_action_from
parameters.description:
A date in format 'YYYY-MM-DD'. All postings that were created or modified in status (confirmed, fixed) on or after this date will be returned.

If specified, the field will be validated. An empty string is not considered a valid date.

parameters.name: date_last_action_to
parameters.description:
A date in format 'YYYY-MM-DD'. All postings that were created or modified in status (confirmed, fixed) on or before this date will be returned.

If specified, the field will be validated. An empty string is not considered a valid date.

parameters.name: account
parameters.description:
A comma separated list of accounts.

Use the following options: all, all financial accounts, free booking and any of your available accounts as numeric value.
The default is "all"

parameters.name: postingaccount
parameters.description:
A comma separated list of postingaccounts.

Use the following options: all, all postingaccounts, all debtors, all creditors and any of your available postingaccounts as numeric value.
The default is "all"

parameters.name: posting_status
parameters.description:
Set the status of the posting.

You have the following options: all, fixed, unfixed

The default is "all"

parameters.name: cost_location
parameters.description: Set a specific cost location code. If specified, only postings to this cost location are returned

parameters.name: order
parameters.description:
Possible values are
"default",
"date ASC",
"date DESC",
"date_last_action ASC",
"date_last_action DESC",
"id_by_customer ASC",
"id_by_customer DESC".

The default order is ascending by date as first and date_last_action as second criterion.

Please not that the validation of the specified value is case sensitive!

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Set a limit of returned postings. NOTE: the maximum limit is 1000!

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Set an offset for the returned postings.

type.description: Can be 'invoice inbound' (“Eingangsrechnung”), 'invoice outbound' (“Ausgangsrechnung”), 'credit inbound' (“Eingangsgutschrift § 14 UStG”), 'credit outbound' (“Ausgangsgutschrift § 14 UStG”).

amount.description: The total amount of the receipt, can be negative to indicate a reversed payment (e.g. -12.30).
